_meta.description: Mirror of the contact_inquiries table, enriched. Dedupe key = lower(email)+lower(company).
_meta.data_access_note: This run has NO direct database access (no secrets, no db reads permitted). leads[] cannot be seeded until a contact_inquiries dump is dropped into docs/ontology/inbox/ or a read-only query path is wired. See digest 'Needs Austin'.
